justification.what: 5 PONG ping tests against cross-ai-reviewer.py: 2x ChatGPT (gpt-5.5), 1x DeepSeek (deepseek-reasoner), 2x failed pre-fix runs that did not consume tokens
justification.why: Verify gpt-5.5 + gemini-3.1-pro-preview model-ID bump and openclaw-openai-api-key-ngothientuong KV name fix work end-to-end before shipping PR to operator+CCN dogfood
justification.who: ccmac-ngo-orchestrator (operator-Mac VS Code Claude Code, Opus 4.7 1M)
justification.how_helps: Confirms /research-with-ais API-parallel mode is functional (was previously broken with stale model IDs gpt-5 / gemini-2.5-pro and missing KV name resolution). Unblocks shipping the model-ID + KV-name fix.
justification.expected_return: Operator's research-with-ais workflow goes from 0/3 working to 2/3 (ChatGPT + DeepSeek). Saves 5-10 min per research cycle vs. browser-paste fallback. Gemini still pending API key provisioning (separate tech-debt).
